Adapters

EnvironmentAdapter

Bases: object

on_rain(intensity: float)[source]

RainIntensity

class RainIntensity(*values)[source]

Bases: RangeLevel

NONE = (0, 10, 0)
LOW = (10, 44, 1)
MEDIUM = (44, 77, 2)
HIGH = (77, 100, 3)

TriggerAdapter

class TriggerAdapter(event_bus: EventBus, rev_beep: ReverseBeep, bank: TriggerBank)[source]

Bases: object

GEAR_REVERSE = -1
SPEED_LIMIT = 100
HANDBRAKE_SPEED = 40
on_reverse(current_gear)[source]
on_tick()[source]
on_speed(speed=0)[source]

Plays speed warning; resets trigger when finished

on_crash(crash)[source]

Plays crash sound once per crash event

on_honk(honk)[source]

Plays honk sound on even counts when stopped

on_handBrake(handBrake)[source]

Plays handbrake sound on alternating calls if available

WindIntensity

class WindIntensity(*values)[source]

Bases: RangeLevel

NONE = (0, 10, 0)
LOW = (10, 55, 1)
HIGH = (55, 100, 2)
